tasks.title: Triage an incident
tasks.prompt: In incident-sim, classify severity and identify the impacted services for the active incident.

tasks.title: Choose a remediation playbook
tasks.prompt: Select the appropriate remediation playbook for the incident class and current risk.

tasks.title: Estimate blast radius
tasks.prompt: Predict the blast radius and customer impact of the proposed remediation before applying it.

tasks.title: DOIL intent for the fix
tasks.prompt: Encode the remediation as a DOIL intent with safety constraints.
